summary: Comprehensive testing of JurisAI application completed. All backend APIs (14/14 tests) and frontend UI flows passed successfully. Login, home dashboard, AI legal analysis, lawyer marketplace, chat interface, and navigation all working correctly. Fixed CRITICAL logger issue in server.py.

issues: Shadow props deprecation warnings - 'shadow*' style props are deprecated, should use 'boxShadow' instead
props.pointerEvents deprecation warning - should use style.pointerEvents

action_items: Update shadow* style props to boxShadow in theme.ts and all component StyleSheets (deprecation warning)
Update package versions: expo-linear-gradient to ~15.0.8 and react-native-svg to 15.12.1 (optional, for best compatibility)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Logger undefined error - Moved logging setup to top of server.py (after imports) so logger is available in generate_ai_response() error handler
Seed function is not fully idempotent - only checks count, so if you delete one item and restart, it won't re-seed (minor issue)
All MongoDB ObjectId exclusion is properly handled with {"_id": 0}
Environment variables are correctly used throughout (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, MONGO_URL, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY)
All API endpoints have proper Pydantic validation
All interactive UI elements have testID attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Backend already has seeded data for 5 lawyers, 2 cases, 4 documents, 2 messages. Test data created during tests is prefixed with TEST_ for easy identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality is working perfectly. Logger issue has been fixed. AI analysis endpoint successfully calls OpenAI GPT-4o and returns structured JSON. Frontend renders correctly on mobile viewport. Deprecation warnings are non-breaking but should be addressed for future compatibility.
rca_of_issue: No blocking issues found. Fixed one CRITICAL code issue: logger was referenced before definition in server.py which would have caused NameError if AI analysis failed. Moved logging setup to top of file after imports. Backend reloaded successfully and all tests still pass.
